summary: Frontend-only re-test of Honour Sports rebrand + new service-detail routes + WhatsApp quote flow. Most acceptance criteria pass: HONOUR SPORTS logo (car silhouette + wordmark + dashed CAR DECOR tagline) renders in header/footer, HS-001 hero badge present, hello@honoursports.in email shown (old hasanambacardecor domain removed), Google Map iframe present, honour.sports/HonourSports socials present, all 4 home Service cards are <Link to=/services/:id> for audio/interior/detailing/lighting, every /services/:id page renders title + italic tagline + long desc + price meta + duration meta + concierge strip + cover image + 6 deliverables + 3-image gallery + 3 related cards + quote form with all required data-testid (quote-name, quote-phone, quote-car, quote-notes, quote-submit-button), invalid /services/foo redirects to home, header nav from detail navigates to /#services, mobile menu opens at 375 width and there is no horizontal scroll on home or detail pages, zero console errors. However 3 bugs remain (see below).

ui_bugs.issue: Floating WhatsApp prefilled message still says 'Hello Hasanamba Car Decor, ...' — old brand name leaked into the message body
Testimonial quote still references 'Hasanamba rebuilt my BMW...' — visible on home page

Served HTML title is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' even though /app/frontend/public/index.html correctly sets 'Honour Sports — Premium Car Stereo & Styling, Hassan'. Likely a platform template/proxy override or stale build. Tab title is wrong in browser.

integration_issues.issue: After scrolling home to y=400 and clicking the audio service card, the destination /services/audio page settles at scrollY=1241 instead of 0. ScrollToTop should reset to top. May be a race between ScrollToTop's instant scroll and useReveal/image layout pushing scroll back, or react-router scroll restoration overriding. Repro: scroll home, click any service card, observe page does not start at the top.

action_items: Update WhatsAppButton.jsx: change prefilled message 'Hello Hasanamba Car Decor' → 'Hello Honour Sports'
Update Testimonials.jsx: replace 'Hasanamba rebuilt my BMW...' with brand-correct copy (e.g. 'Honour Sports rebuilt my BMW...')

Investigate why served document.title is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' despite public/index.html being correct — check if a hosted preview proxy is overriding the title or if frontend build is stale; consider also setting document.title from App.js/useEffect as a runtime safety net

Fix ScrollToTop race: try scrollTo(0,0) after a microtask / requestAnimationFrame, or use window.scrollTo({top:0,left:0}) without behavior:'instant' (some browsers ignore 'instant'). Verify route change from home (with non-zero scroll) lands at top of detail page
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteRequestForm correctly opens wa.me/919741908073 with encoded prefill — verified in source; URL contains service title, name, phone, car, notes
ScrollToTop uses behavior:'instant' which some browsers treat as 'auto' — safer to omit behavior or use 'auto'
Two hardcoded 'Hasanamba' strings missed in rebrand search (WhatsAppButton + Testimonials) — recommend a final grep -ri 'hasanamba' /app/frontend/src before release
All 4 service entries in /app/frontend/src/data/services.js have exactly 6 deliverables and 3 gallery images as specified — verified
Header.jsx buildHref properly prefixes anchor with '/' on non-home routes, so nav 'Services' on a detail page goes to /#services — verified working
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static marketing site at https://hasanamba-premium.preview.emergentagent.com. 5 client-side routes (/ and /services/:id for audio/interior/detailing/lighting). No backend integration — quote form opens wa.me URL via window.open. Intercept window.open via page.evaluate before clicking submit (note: re-set the override on each page load, not just once). Major rebrand verified except 2 leftover 'Hasanamba' strings in WhatsAppButton.jsx (L15) and Testimonials.jsx (L15) and a wrong served <title>. ScrollToTop behavior should be re-tested after main agent fix.
rca of the issue: 1) Hasanamba leftovers: rebrand sweep missed string literals in WhatsAppButton.jsx and Testimonials.jsx — fix by replacing the brand name in both files. 2) Wrong <title>: index.html has correct title; suspect platform-level HTML transform on preview domain — mitigation: also set document.title in a useEffect at App-mount level as runtime fallback. 3) ScrollToTop fails from scrolled home → detail: ScrollToTop fires scrollTo(0,'instant') on pathname change, but content reveal/layout-shift can re-introduce scroll; replace with a useLayoutEffect + window.scrollTo(0,0) without behavior, or call inside requestAnimationFrame after layout.
